title: The reunion question
desc: Reflect on your journey out loud
setting: An old friend from America is visiting and asks, over dinner, whether it was all worth it.

steps.speaker: Fründ
steps.es: Sag ehrlich: hät sich das alls glohnt, so wiit weg z'zieh?
steps.en: Tell me honestly: was it all worth it, moving so far away?

options.es: Ja. Es isch hert gsii, aber ich würd's wider mache.
options.en: Yes. It was hard, but I'd do it again.
options.feedback: Honest about the cost and the reward both — a grounded, earned answer.
It is — but they came a long way to ask, so let them in a little.
A bit glib — the truth, including the hard parts, would mean more to an old friend.

steps.speaker: Fründ
steps.en: What was the hardest part, honestly?

options.es: Am Aafang d'Eismkeit. Niemmer kenne, niemmer verstah.
options.en: At the start, the loneliness. Knowing no one, understanding no one.
options.feedback: Real and vulnerable — this is the kind of honesty that deepens an old friendship.
Honest and relatable. You could add a word on how it felt, but this is solid.
That can't be quite true after such a journey — trust them with the real answer.

steps.speaker: Fründ
steps.es: Und jetz? Fühlsch di würkli dehei da?
steps.en: And now? Do you really feel at home here?

options.es: Ja. Nöd well alls perfekt isch, sondern well's mis isch.
options.en: Yes. Not because it's all perfect, but because it's mine.
options.feedback: A profound, hard-won line — this is what arrival actually sounds like.

options.es: Meh als ich dänkt hätt, ehrlich.
options.en: More than I'd have thought, honestly.

options.feedback: Honest, but you've come further than that — let yourself claim it.

steps.speaker: Fründ
steps.es: Ich bi würkli stolz uf di. Du häsch der es ganz neus Läbe ufbout.
steps.en: I'm really proud of you. You've built yourself a whole new life.

options.es: Das bedütet mer viel, vo dir. Merci, dass d'cho bisch.
options.en: That means a lot, coming from you. Thanks for coming.
options.feedback: Warm, grateful, and present — a beautiful way to receive an old friend's pride.

options.es: Mer wachst halt a de Useforderige.
options.en: You grow through the challenges, after all.
options.feedback: Reflective and wise — a graceful response.

options.es: Ach, so bsundrig isch es nöd.
options.feedback: Don't wave it away — you did something genuinely hard. Let them say it.
